en.commentary:
2026 is the year smart glasses split into two clearly different products and stopped pretending to be one category. AI camera glasses (Ray-Ban Meta, Oakley Meta, Solos) live on your face all day, listen, see, and answer. AR display glasses (XREAL, Viture, RayNeo) plug into a phone or laptop and float a virtual monitor in front of you. The Meta Ray-Ban Display is the first product trying to bridge both worlds with an actual in-lens HUD. I ranked these the way a real buyer would shop them, by which one earns its place on your face, not by spec sheets.

Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 takes first because it is the only smart glasses product in 2026 that I would tell a friend to buy without a list of caveats. The Wayfarer, Headliner, and Skyler frames look like Ray-Bans, full stop. The 3K Ultra HD camera is a real generational jump from the 1080p first generation, the battery hits roughly 8 hours of mixed use, and Meta AI on the glasses is genuinely useful for translation, identifying landmarks, and answering quick questions while your phone stays in your pocket. At $379 it is the cheapest premium option in the list and the easiest one to actually wear in public.

Oakley Meta HSTN is second and the right answer for anyone whose life involves sweat. Same Meta AI stack as the Ray-Ban, same camera quality, but with IPX4 protection, Prizm lens options, and a frame geometry that stays put when you run. At $399 it is barely a premium over the Ray-Ban for what amounts to a sport-optimized version of the same product, and Oakley's lens catalog is in another league for outdoor use.

Meta Ray-Ban Display lands at three because it is the most futuristic product in the list and also the one with the biggest asterisks. The 600x600 in-lens display at up to 5,000 nits is genuinely visible in direct sunlight, and the bundled Meta Neural Band wristband reading EMG signals from your wrist is the most natural input method any consumer wearable has shipped. But it is $799, US-only as of April 2026, and battery life takes a hit from driving the display. Buy it if you want to be the first person at your office wearing a HUD. Wait for Gen 2 if you want a daily driver.

XREAL One Pro is fourth and the smartest AR display purchase in 2026. The 57-degree FoV is the widest in any consumer AR glasses, the dual Sony 1080p micro-OLED at 120Hz looks identical to a high-end OLED monitor floating in front of you, and the X1 spatial chip locks the virtual screen in place when you turn your head. The permanent price drop to $599 made this the obvious recommendation for anyone who wants a portable second display for laptop work or Steam Deck gaming.

Oakley Meta Vanguard at five is the niche pick for athletes who already wear a Sphaera shape and want the AI features without changing their cycling kit. The 9-hour battery and Garmin or Strava integration are excellent, but the centered 3K camera is more limited than the dual-camera Ray-Ban setup, and the wraparound shape is too aggressive for daily city wear.

XREAL One at six is the value version of the One Pro. Same X1 chip, same 120Hz dual 1080p panels, same spatial tracking, just a narrower 50-degree FoV. At $449 it is the gateway product into AR displays for anyone who finds $599 too steep.

Viture Pro XR at seven punches above its weight on software. The SpaceWalker app handles spatial computing on Mac and Windows better than XREAL Beam in some workflows, the real-time 2D-to-3D conversion is genuinely fun for movies, and the 4,000-nit panels look great. It loses to XREAL only on field of view and head-tracking polish.

Even Realities G1 at eight is the only product in this list that solves the social problem of smart glasses by looking like prescription titanium frames you would buy from your optometrist. The green micro-LED waveguide is intentionally minimal, displaying notifications, turn-by-turn navigation, and translation captions only. If you want a discreet daily wearable that happens to do AR, this is it. Just know the AI features are basic compared to Meta.

Solos AirGo V Krypton 1 at nine is the budget AI camera glasses pick. ChatGPT-4o and Gemini support, swappable front plates, $299 entry, but the camera quality and Meta AI ecosystem cannot match Ray-Ban. Worth it if your budget caps at $300 and you specifically want the OpenAI or Google AI stack.

RayNeo X3 Pro at ten is a fascinating product that is not for most people. True binocular full-color AR with on-board Snapdragon AR1 means you can use it without a tethered phone, and CES 2026 gave it a deserved Innovation Award. But $1,099 is enthusiast pricing, the battery life is the worst in the list, and the consumer software ecosystem is years behind XREAL. Watch this space, do not buy it yet.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 is the smart glasses you can actually recommend to your parents
highlights.body: Every other product on this list comes with a tutorial. Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 comes with a Wayfarer frame your dad already owns. The 3K camera is twice the resolution of Gen 1 with cleaner low-light capture, the battery survives a full sightseeing day, and Meta AI handles translation and visual lookups well enough to replace pulling out your phone in restaurants and airports. At $379 it costs less than a flagship phone case for what is the most polished consumer wearable since AirPods.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN is the version Meta should have launched first for the active market
highlights.body: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 is great for street wear. It is also embarrassing on a bike ride. Oakley Meta HSTN takes the same AI platform and wraps it in a frame engineered for sport. IPX4 sweat resistance, Prizm lenses that handle bright sun better than any tinted Ray-Ban, and a temple geometry that does not slide off during a run. The $20 premium over the base Ray-Ban is the right tax for any buyer who exercises in their glasses, and Strava and Garmin integration on the Vanguard variant proves Meta is serious about athletes.

highlights.title: The Meta Ray-Ban Display is a $799 thrill ride for early adopters and nobody else
highlights.body: I love this product and I am telling most people to wait. The in-lens HUD at 5,000 nits is the first heads-up display I can read outdoors, the Neural Band reading wrist EMG signals is genuinely the most natural input I have used on a wearable, and the teleprompter and turn-by-turn nav use cases work today. But the international rollout is paused, battery life takes a real hit, and at $799 you are buying first-generation hardware with the trade-offs that always come with that. The right purchase for builders, content creators, and people who buy the first iPhone every year. The wrong purchase if you want a daily driver in 2026.

highlights.title: XREAL One Pro at $599 is the only AR display I tell laptop users to actually buy
highlights.body: AR display glasses have been a niche category for three years. XREAL One Pro is the first one that crosses into mainstream value. 57-degree field of view means the virtual monitor finally fills your visual field. The X1 chip locking the screen in place when you turn your head fixes the only real complaint anyone had about earlier XREAL models. And the permanent price drop to $599 puts it below a 27-inch QHD desk monitor for what is effectively a portable Pro Display XDR you carry in a glasses case. Anyone working from coffee shops or commuting with a Steam Deck should treat this as the default.

highlights.title: Smart glasses split into two product categories in 2026 and that is good for buyers
highlights.body: AI camera glasses and AR display glasses solve different problems. The Ray-Ban Meta family lives on your face and listens. The XREAL and Viture family plugs into your laptop or handheld and gives you a screen. Meta Ray-Ban Display is trying to be both. Buyers who pick a category first and then a product within that category will be much happier than buyers who try to find one pair that does everything. The good news is that 2026 is the first year both categories have a clear winner, and you do not have to settle in either one.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年是智慧眼鏡正式分成兩種完全不同產品的一年，終於不用再裝成同一個品類。AI 相機眼鏡（Ray-Ban Meta、Oakley Meta、Solos）整天戴在臉上，會聽、會看、會回答你。AR 顯示眼鏡（XREAL、Viture、RayNeo）接上手機或筆電，在你眼前浮一塊虛擬螢幕。Meta Ray-Ban Display 是第一款想用真正的鏡片內 HUD 把兩邊接起來的產品。這份排行我是用一般人實際買回家會怎麼戴的角度來排，不是看規格表。

Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 排第一，因為它是 2026 年智慧眼鏡裡唯一一款，我推薦給朋友不用先列一堆但書的產品。Wayfarer、Headliner、Skyler 三款框型就是 Ray-Ban，沒有違和感。3K Ultra HD 相機比第一代 1080p 是真正的世代差距，混合使用大概撐 8 小時，眼鏡上的 Meta AI 用來翻譯、辨識景點、回答簡單問題真的有用，手機可以放口袋裡。台幣一萬二上下是這份清單裡最便宜的高階選項，也是最容易戴出門不尷尬的一款。

Oakley Meta HSTN 排第二，是有運動需求的人該選的版本。Meta AI 平台跟相機畫質都跟 Ray-Ban 一樣，但多了 IPX4 防汗、Prizm 鏡片可選、鏡腳幾何在跑步時不會滑下來。比 Ray-Ban 只貴 20 美元，等於用很合理的差價換到運動最佳化的同一款產品，Oakley 的鏡片型錄在戶外場景比 Ray-Ban 強一個檔次。

Meta Ray-Ban Display 排第三，是這份清單裡最有未來感的產品，但也是但書最多的一款。鏡片內 600x600 顯示器最高 5,000 nits，太陽底下真的看得到，盒裝附的 Meta Neural Band 神經手環讀手腕 EMG 訊號，是目前消費級穿戴裝置最自然的輸入方式。但售價台幣兩萬五，2026 年 4 月還是只有美國買得到，加上要驅動顯示器電池會掉一截。如果你想當辦公室第一個戴 HUD 的人，這台就是答案。如果你想買一支天天戴的智慧眼鏡，等第二代比較實在。

XREAL One Pro 排第四，是 2026 年最聰明的 AR 顯示眼鏡選擇。57 度視野是消費級 AR 眼鏡裡最寬的，雙眼 Sony 1080p micro-OLED 120Hz 看起來就像一台高階 OLED 螢幕浮在眼前，X1 空間晶片在你轉頭時把虛擬螢幕鎖在原位。永久降價到 599 美元之後，誰想要一台帶著走的副螢幕配筆電工作或接 Steam Deck，這台就是預設答案。

Oakley Meta Vanguard 排第五，是給已經習慣 Sphaera 包覆型運動鏡型的運動員，想要 AI 功能但又不想換裝備時的選擇。9 小時電池跟整合 Garmin、Strava 都很棒，但中置單顆 3K 相機比 Ray-Ban 雙鏡頭限制多，包覆造型也太強烈，平日進城戴會太挑場合。

XREAL One 排第六，是 One Pro 的標準版。一樣 X1 晶片、一樣 120Hz 雙眼 1080p 面板、一樣空間追蹤，只差視野角縮到 50 度。售價 449 美元，是覺得 599 太貴又想試 AR 顯示的人最好的入門選項。

Viture Pro XR 排第七，軟體做得超出價位該有的水準。SpaceWalker app 在 Mac 和 Windows 上某些工作流程處理空間運算比 XREAL Beam 順，即時 2D 轉 3D 看電影確實好玩，4,000 nits 面板亮度也漂亮。輸給 XREAL 的地方只在視野角跟頭部追蹤的細膩度。

Even Realities G1 排第八，是這份清單裡唯一一款解決智慧眼鏡社交尷尬的產品，外觀就是一支你會在配鏡店買的鈦合金處方眼鏡。綠色 micro-LED 波導故意做得很簡約，只投影通知、轉彎導航和翻譯字幕。想要一支低調日戴又剛好有 AR 的眼鏡，就是它了。要知道它的 AI 功能比 Meta 陽春很多，這點要先有心理準備。

Solos AirGo V Krypton 1 排第九，是預算型的 AI 相機眼鏡。支援 ChatGPT-4o 跟 Gemini、前蓋模組可換、起價 299 美元，但相機畫質跟 Meta AI 生態系比不上 Ray-Ban。預算卡在 1 萬塊以內、又特別想用 OpenAI 或 Google AI 的人值得考慮。

RayNeo X3 Pro 排第十，是這份清單裡最有意思但不是給大多數人買的產品。雙眼真彩色 AR，機身內建 Snapdragon AR1，可以脫離手機獨立運作，CES 2026 拿了創新獎名副其實。但 1,099 美元是發燒友定價，電池續航是這份清單最差的一款，消費端軟體生態系比 XREAL 落後好幾年。值得追蹤，但現在還不是出手的時機。

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 是這份清單裡你可以推薦給爸媽的智慧眼鏡
highlights.body: 其他每一款產品都附帶一張使用教學。Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 附帶一支你爸已經有的 Wayfarer。3K 相機畫素是 Gen 1 兩倍、低光雜訊明顯改善，電池撐得過一整天觀光行程，Meta AI 翻譯和視覺辨識在餐廳和機場真的可以取代你掏手機。一萬二台幣的入手價比一支旗艦手機殼還便宜，是 AirPods 之後最完成度高的消費級穿戴。

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN 是 Meta 應該優先發給運動族群的版本
highlights.body: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 街拍很好看，騎腳踏車戴出門有點丟臉。Oakley Meta HSTN 把同一套 AI 平台塞進專為運動設計的鏡框。IPX4 防汗、Prizm 鏡片在強光下比任何 Ray-Ban 染色片都強，鏡腳幾何跑步時不會滑下來。比基本款 Ray-Ban 多 20 美元，對任何戴眼鏡運動的人來說是合理的稅金，Vanguard 版本還整合 Strava 跟 Garmin，證明 Meta 對運動族群是認真的。

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display 是給早期採用者玩的兩萬五大冒險，其他人先別跳
highlights.body: 我超喜歡這款產品，但我會跟大多數人說再等等。鏡片內 5,000 nits HUD 是我第一次能在戶外看清楚的抬頭顯示器，Neural Band 讀手腕 EMG 訊號真的是我用過最自然的穿戴輸入法，提詞器跟轉彎導航在當下就能用。但國際版發售暫停、電池續航明顯被砍、台幣兩萬五是一代產品該有的代價。適合喜歡買新東西的開發者、內容創作者、每年都搶第一支 iPhone 的人。想找一支 2026 年天天戴的眼鏡，這台不對。

highlights.title: XREAL One Pro 599 美元，是我會推薦筆電族真的下手買的 AR 顯示眼鏡
highlights.body: AR 顯示眼鏡這個品類玩了三年才終於出現主流 CP 值產品。XREAL One Pro 就是。57 度視野讓虛擬螢幕真的填滿視野範圍，X1 晶片轉頭螢幕鎖位置這件事，把以前 XREAL 唯一的痛點解決了。永久降到 599 美元，比一台 27 吋 QHD 桌機螢幕還便宜，等於你用一個眼鏡盒帶著一台 Pro Display XDR 出門。常常在咖啡廳工作或通勤帶 Steam Deck 的人，就直接買它。

highlights.title: 智慧眼鏡在 2026 年正式分成兩個品類，這對買家是好事
highlights.body: AI 相機眼鏡跟 AR 顯示眼鏡解決的是兩個不同的問題。Ray-Ban Meta 那一派整天戴在臉上、會聽你講話。XREAL 跟 Viture 那一派接上筆電或掌機、給你一個螢幕。Meta Ray-Ban Display 想兩邊兼顧。先決定你要哪一種、再從那一類挑產品的人，買回家會比想找一支什麼都會的眼鏡的人開心很多。好消息是 2026 年是這兩種品類第一次都有明確贏家的一年，你不用在哪一邊將就。

en.commentary: Smart glasses category is the fastest-moving in 2026 wearables and the Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 holds first because Meta finally got the AI assistant integration right and the camera quality is now good enough to replace a casual GoPro. The 12MP sensor with the new ISP and the Meta AI's Live Translation feature working in 12 languages is the combination that defines the category. Oakley Meta HSTN at #2 is the same platform in athletic frames. Meta Ray-Ban Display at #3 is the new tier with an actual heads-up display in the right lens. XREAL One Pro at #4 holds because of the displayed AR pick. Oakley Meta Vanguard at #5 is the wraparound athletic pick. XREAL One at #6 is the entry XREAL. VITURE Pro XR at #7 is the gaming AR alternative. Even Realities G1 at #8 is the prescription-glasses-with-display pick. Solos AirGo V Krypton at #9 is the audio-only smart glasses. RayNeo X3 Pro at #10 is the value pick. Pick Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 unless you specifically need a display.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 holds first because the AI integration finally works
highlights.body: Meta AI's Live Translation feature works in 12 languages, the camera's 12MP sensor with the new ISP captures usable photos in low light, and the touch controls on the temples are the most refined in the category. At $379 it is priced like premium sunglasses and the AI features actually justify the smart half of smart glasses.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is the heads-up display tier that earns the price
highlights.body: Heads-up display in the right lens shows notifications, navigation arrows, and the live translation captions. The display is small and discreet enough that it does not look weird in social settings. At $799 it is twice the Gen 2 and the right pick for buyers who specifically want a display.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN is the athletic frame Meta platform
highlights.body: Same Meta AI features, same camera, same battery, in an Oakley wraparound frame designed for cycling and running. At $399 it is $20 more than the Ray-Ban and the right pick for buyers who want smart glasses for sport, not for everyday wear.

highlights.title: XREAL One Pro is the displayed AR pick if you want a screen, not assistance
highlights.body: 57-degree FOV virtual screen, the X1 chip handling the rendering, and the ability to tether to a phone or Steam Deck for displayed media. At $599 it is for buyers who want a personal display they wear, not glasses with a camera and AI.

highlights.title: Solos AirGo V Krypton is the audio-only pick for buyers who do not want cameras
highlights.body: Open-ear audio in glasses frames with no camera. At $249 it is the right pick for buyers who specifically do not want the privacy implications of cameras on their face. Picture quality and AI features are not the use case here.

en.commentary: Smart glasses finally feel like a product instead of a tech demo, and the Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 is the reason. The 12 MP camera with 3K video, the upgraded six-mic array that picks up actual conversation in wind, and Meta AI's on-device live translation are features I now use daily, not weekly. Battery life jumped to 8 hours with the new charging case providing 48 hours total, which is the threshold where I stopped charging mid-day. The 9.3 score reflects that this is now a daily-driver product. Oakley Meta HSTN at 8.9 is the athletic version with PRIZM lenses and IPX4 water resistance, and for runners the wraparound fit beats Ray-Ban hands down. Meta Ray-Ban Display at 8.7 is the first heads-up version with a 600x600 right-eye display and the Neural Band wrist controller, and it's a fascinating product I'd buy if I commuted on subways for navigation. XREAL One Pro at 8.6 is a different beast entirely with tethered AR for content viewing, and the Oakley Meta Vanguard at 8.4 caps the sport segment. Memorial Day shoppers should buy the Ray-Ban Gen 2 unless you specifically train outdoors, in which case Oakley HSTN is the answer.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 graduated from gadget to daily wear
highlights.body: The Gen 2's 8-hour battery and 12 MP, 3K video sensor turn smart glasses into a tool I actually pick up every morning. Live translation in 60 languages with Meta AI works in restaurant noise that defeated Gen 1. The 48-hour charging case means I no longer plan around battery anxiety. At $379, this is the first smart glasses I'd recommend without caveats to any tech-curious adult. It's the iPhone 4 moment for this category.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN is the athlete's pick
highlights.body: PRIZM lens technology in a smart-glasses body finally exists, and IPX4 water resistance handles sweat without the device dying. The wraparound fit stays put on a 10K run, where Ray-Ban frames slip. 9-hour battery and the same Meta AI feature set make this the sport variant Meta should have launched alongside Gen 1. At $499, it's $120 more than Ray-Ban for the right reasons if you train hard outdoors.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is the early-adopter heads-up bet
highlights.body: A monocular 600x600 in-lens display plus the Neural Band wristband for gesture control sounds gimmicky until you use turn-by-turn walking directions on a New York sidewalk. Then it clicks. Battery is the weak point at 6 hours with display use, and at $799 it's premium-priced. But this is the first credible AR-glasses product from a mainstream brand, and the platform is going to grow fast through 2026.

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧眼鏡終於不再只是科技展示品，而是真正能用的產品，Ray-Ban Meta 第二代就是關鍵。12 MP 鏡頭拍 3K 影片、升級六麥克風陣列在風中還能收清楚對話、Meta AI 本地端即時翻譯，這些功能我現在每天都用，不是每週用一次。電池跳到 8 小時，搭配新的充電盒總共 48 小時，這個門檻一過我就不用中午充電了。9.3 分就是反映「這台已經是日常用品」這件事。Oakley Meta HSTN 拿 8.9 是運動版本，PRIZM 鏡片加 IPX4 防水，跑步族戴包覆式設計絕對贏 Ray-Ban。Meta Ray-Ban Display 拿 8.7 是第一個有抬頭顯示的版本，右眼 600x600 顯示加上 Neural Band 手環控制，這台很有趣，如果我每天通勤搭捷運用導航就會買。XREAL One Pro 拿 8.6 是完全不同路線，有線連接的 AR 看影片用。Oakley Meta Vanguard 拿 8.4 收尾運動組。我跟你講，紀念日要買就買 Ray-Ban 第二代，除非你戶外訓練重度使用，那才挑 Oakley HSTN。

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta 第二代從新奇玩具升級成日常配戴
highlights.body: 第二代 8 小時續航加上 12 MP 3K 影片感光元件，把智慧眼鏡變成我每天早上會主動拿起來戴的工具。Meta AI 60 種語言即時翻譯在餐廳吵雜環境也能用，第一代根本辦不到。48 小時充電盒讓我不用再計算電量焦慮。賣 NT$11,800 是我第一支會無保留推薦給任何對科技感興趣的成年人的智慧眼鏡，這就是這個品類的 iPhone 4 時刻。

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN 是運動族的答案
highlights.body: PRIZM 鏡片技術終於放進智慧眼鏡裡，IPX4 防水能扛汗水不會掛掉。包覆式設計跑 10K 都不會滑，戴 Ray-Ban 跑會一直滑下來。9 小時電池跟一樣的 Meta AI 功能，這就是 Meta 第一代當時應該同步出的運動版。賣 NT$15,500 比 Ray-Ban 貴 NT$3,700 是有道理的，戶外重度訓練的人值得多花這筆。

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display 是早期嚐鮮派的抬頭顯示之選
highlights.body: 單眼 600x600 鏡片內顯示器加上 Neural Band 手環手勢控制，聽起來很噱頭，可是你在台北街頭走路用逐步導航之後就會懂。電池是弱點，用顯示器只有 6 小時，NT$24,800 屬於高價位帶。可是這就是主流品牌第一支真正可信的 AR 眼鏡產品，2026 年下半年這個平台一定會快速成長。

The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 keeps first because the integrated Meta AI assistant, the 2025 firmware update that finally made live translation usable, and the broad designer-frame compatibility make it the only smart glasses I'd actually wear daily. At $299 it's the easiest smart glasses recommendation of the year. The Meta Ray-Ban Display takes third because the integrated heads-up display is genuinely a meaningful technology preview, but at $799 with limited app support it's still in early-adopter territory rather than mainstream-recommended. At $299 it's the easiest smart glasses recommendation of the year.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN wins for outdoor sports use

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is the heads-up technology preview worth knowing about

zh-tw.commentary: 智慧眼鏡買氣隨著 Meta Ray-Ban Display 主流上市進入轉折點，2026 年排行不動，前段班的位置都站得有差異化的理由。第一名 Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 守住，整合 Meta AI 助理、2025 年韌體更新終於讓即時翻譯實用、設計師鏡框相容性廣，是唯一我會每天戴的智慧眼鏡。NT$10,000 上下是今年最容易推的選擇。第二名 Oakley Meta HSTN 守得住，運動取向鏡框設計加同樣的 Meta AI 整合，給真的需要戶外運動使用而不是日常配戴的人是正解。第三名 Meta Ray-Ban Display 拿下，整合抬頭顯示真的是有意義的技術預覽，但 NT$25,000 上下加應用程式支援有限，還在早期採用者領域，不算主流推薦。2026 年的脈絡是相機跟 AI 助理整合的智慧眼鏡完全進入主流消費領域，抬頭顯示段是下一個邊界，Meta 有技術領先但使用場景還在摸索。

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 是我唯一願意每天戴的智慧眼鏡

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN 適合戶外運動

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 at $279 is the cheapest since launch
highlights.body: Meta's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring 2026 sale. 12MP 3K video plus Meta AI integration plus all-day battery at $279 closes the value argument decisively for any mainstream smart glasses buyer. Memorial Day cuts will not go lower.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta HSTN May 6 firmware adds run-tracking integration

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is still the early-adopter pick, not the mainstream pick
highlights.body: The heads-up display variant works but the use cases that genuinely need a display rather than audio output are still narrower than the marketing suggests. For early adopters who specifically want the display, this is the pick. Mainstream buyers should buy the Gen 2 instead.

en.commentary: Smart glasses are the gift category Mother's Day weekend actually moved this year. Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 is still my number one pick and the post-holiday data backs me up. The dual 12MP camera with 3K video, the new Meta AI live translation that shipped last month, and the 8-hour battery are simply the best combination at 379 dollars. I had three friends ask me about Meta Display this weekend because the demos on TikTok went viral again, and my answer is the same. The 799 dollar Display version is a tech demo wrapped in glasses. The neural band wristband is cool but you cannot use the display in sunlight without squinting. Stick with Gen 2 until version 2 of Display ships. Oakley Meta HSTN holds second because the sport frame finally feels right on faces that Wayfarers do not fit. Vanguard is the niche wraparound for cyclists with the 12 hour battery. Xreal One Pro is the laptop-replacement display glasses pick and Samsung's reported AR glasses delay to fall keeps that lane open. Even Realities G1 keeps slipping because the prescription lens integration is amazing but the smart features lag a year behind Meta. RayNeo X3 Pro is exciting on paper but the consumer ship date is still vapor in the US market. Bottom line on the Tuesday after Mother's Day: if Mom got Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 she will use them every day; if she got Display she will use them for one week and stash them.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 is the only smart glasses I recommend without caveats
highlights.body: 3K video, 8-hour battery, real-time Meta AI translation, and they look like normal Ray-Bans because they are normal Ray-Bans. At 379 dollars you are paying camera money for camera-plus-AI hardware. Every other glasses on this list has a but attached. Gen 2 has none.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is a 799 dollar tech demo
highlights.body: The right-eye HUD is real and the neural wristband works. But in bright sunlight you cannot read the display, the battery dies in 4 hours with the display active, and the use cases beyond messages and turn-by-turn nav are thin. Skip version 1. Buy version 2.

highlights.title: Oakley Meta Vanguard is the cyclist's purpose-built pick
highlights.body: Wraparound sport frame, 12 hour battery, Garmin and Strava integration that records POV video tagged with your speed and heart rate. If you ride more than 100 miles a week this is the only smart glasses that makes sense. For everyone else it looks aggressive.

highlights.title: Xreal One Pro is the productivity display glasses winner
highlights.body: Connect it to a MacBook or Steam Deck and you get a 165-inch virtual display with 3DOF tracking. 599 dollars feels reasonable when you compare it to a portable monitor plus stand. The Vision Pro at 3500 dollars has nothing on it for this specific job.

en.commentary: The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 stays on top because the Moor Insights & Strategy research note this week reinforces what owners have been saying since launch: this is finally the smart-glasses product that real people will wear all day without thinking about it. The Meta Ray-Ban Display moves up materially on momentum because Meta opened the Display to web app developers this week, which means the URL-launchable web app model is now live and the ecosystem is about to expand fast. The Gizmodo framing that the Display is 'about to get a lot more chaotic' is accurate, and chaotic in this category is good. The display itself still hits 5,000 nits at max brightness and 90Hz refresh, and translation plus walking directions are the killer use cases. The Oakley Meta HSTN holds third and remains the right pick for sport-styled buyers who want the Meta AI stack without the classic Ray-Ban silhouette. The Oakley Meta Vanguard holds fourth. The XREAL One Pro stays fifth and is still the right pick for buyers who care about display tech more than AI features. The Gadgeteer's May 1 comparison framing Google AI Glasses versus Meta Ray-Ban as 'smart eyewear's first real fight' is the right framing for the second half of 2026. Today, Meta is still winning.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display web app opening is the ecosystem unlock
highlights.body: Developers can now ship URL-launchable web apps to Display plus Neural Band. This turns Display from a closed feature set into a platform with real third-party momentum. Score moves up because the trajectory now matters more than today's app count.

highlights.body: Moor Insights research note this week confirms what owners have been saying: this is the first smart-glasses product real people wear all day without thinking. That is the entire game in this category. Locked-in top spot.

highlights.body: The Gadgeteer's May 1 framing of Google AI Glasses versus Meta Ray-Ban as the first real fight is accurate for H2 2026. Today Meta is still winning because the hardware ships and the ecosystem opening is now public. Watch the Google response carefully through summer.

Meta Ray-Ban Display 動能上明顯上揚，因為 Meta 這禮拜把 Display 對網頁應用開發者開放，URL 啟動的 web app 模式現在正式上線，生態系即將快速擴張。Gizmodo 用「即將變得更加混亂」這個說法很準確，這個分類混亂是好事。顯示本身還是維持 5,000 nits 最高亮度跟 90Hz 更新率，翻譯跟導航是殺手級使用情境。

en.commentary: Tuesday Day 2 of Memorial Day week and Ray-Ban Meta Wayfarer Gen 2 still owns first. The bigger signal today is that the Meta retail bundle pages updated overnight with the prescription-lens partner stores expanded to three more US metros, which removes the last excuse for daily-wear holdouts. Live translation at conversational pace remains the killer feature for travel buyers eyeing summer trips, and Meta AI plus the camera plus the open-ear audio is still the only package that does five things adequately for one $379 ticket. Oakley Meta HSTN holds second and the Strava integration is genuinely the differentiator for buyers who run or cycle five days a week. The form factor wraps better for high-pace activity and the run summary cards inside the Meta View app are clean. Solos AirGo 3 stays third as the audio-only camera-free option, which the privacy-cautious office buyer should still treat as the default. Xreal One at fourth is still riding the May iPhone tether firmware that opened the AR display platform to the other half of phone owners, and the practical use case is still travel video on planes. Rokid Max 2 in the upper mid-pack continues to do better spatial display work than entry Xreal. Below Rokid the field stays thin. The Tuesday verdict is the same as Monday, Ray-Ban Meta unless your specific use case is AR display.

en.commentary: I have spent the holiday weekend swapping between every pair in this list, and by Sunday morning I keep reaching for the Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 first. The new 3K camera finally captures family barbecues at a quality I am happy to post, and the eight hour battery means I can leave the charging case at home for an entire cookout. Meta AI has also grown up: I can ask it to translate a menu, identify a plant in the yard, or remember where I parked, and the answers arrive in about two seconds through the open ear speakers. The Meta Ray-Ban Display is the more exciting purchase if you want to live in the future right now, because the in lens HUD is sharp enough to read full text messages outdoors and the Neural Band wristband makes silent reply genuinely usable. Oakley Meta HSTN and Vanguard cover the athletic side beautifully, with Vanguard hitting a nine hour day and pulling Strava metrics straight into your ear. For pure AR media I still love the XREAL One Pro and Viture Luma Pro, both of which give me a private 200 inch screen on a plane seat. Memorial Day Monday is the final window before pricing resets on Tuesday, so if you have been circling a pair, today is the day to pull the trigger while the holiday gift cards and bundle deals are still live across retailers.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 leads the everyday pick
highlights.body: The 3K Ultra HD camera, eight hour battery, and refined Meta AI make the Gen 2 the easiest pair to recommend for the broadest audience, especially at the $379 starting price with holiday bundle credits.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display is the future on your face
highlights.body: A 5,000 nit in lens HUD plus the Neural Band wristband lets me reply to messages with finger gestures, and the $799 bundle still feels like a bargain for first generation AR that actually works outdoors.

highlights.title: AR media still belongs to XREAL and Viture
highlights.body: The XREAL One Pro and Viture Luma Pro deliver the cleanest virtual displays for flights and dorm setups, and both saw aggressive Memorial Day price cuts that close tonight at most major retailers.

zh-tw.commentary: 整個連假我把這幾副眼鏡輪流戴著出門，到了星期天早上還是最常抓 Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 出門。新一代的 3K 相機把家庭烤肉拍得超漂亮，發 IG 完全不用修，加上八小時電池，整場聚會把充電盒丟在家裡也沒問題。Meta AI 這次真的長大了，問它翻譯菜單、辨識院子裡的植物、甚至幫我記停車位置，差不多兩秒就從開放式耳機講給我聽，很順。Meta Ray-Ban Display 則是你想直接活在未來的那個選擇，鏡片內 HUD 在大太陽下讀完整訊息都沒問題，搭配的 Neural Band 神經手環讓無聲手勢回訊息變得實用。Oakley Meta HSTN 跟 Vanguard 把運動族群顧得很好，Vanguard 撐九小時、還能把 Strava 數據直接報進耳朵裡，騎車跑步戴超爽。要看影片的話 XREAL One Pro 跟 Viture Luma Pro 我還是最愛，飛機上一秒變 200 吋私人螢幕。連假最後一天就是今天，禮拜二開盤價格就會調回去，看上哪一副就趁今天下單，台灣水貨商跟代購的連假折扣也大多今晚收檔。

en.commentary: Friday after Memorial Day and the smart glasses market settled exactly where I expected. Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 held the $379 base price through the week, the Meta Ray-Ban Display still ships at $799 with the Neural Band included, and Oakley Meta HSTN dropped to $349 with a Father's Day banner already on the Meta storefront. Three weeks of lead time is enough to ship comfortably, and smart glasses are an unusually clean gift because they actually solve the dad-on-a-bike or dad-at-the-grill use cases. The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 stays my unconditional top pick. The 3K camera captures family barbecues at quality I am happy to post, the eight-hour battery means the charging case stays home, and Meta AI has matured enough to translate menus, identify plants, and remember where you parked. The Meta Ray-Ban Display at $799 is the future-buyer pick because the in-lens HUD is sharp enough to read full text messages outdoors and the Neural Band makes silent reply genuinely usable. Oakley Meta HSTN at $349 is the athletic dad gift this Father's Day. The lighter frame, prescription-ready lens, and Strava metrics piped through the open-ear speakers make this the cycling and running pair I have stopped traveling without. XREAL One Pro at $649 still owns the AR media space, and the Viture Luma Pro at $499 is the airplane-seat private screen I gift to dads who travel. Friday end-of-week shoppers should pull the trigger now because Meta inventory tightens after June 10 and Father's Day demand surges.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 過後的禮拜五，智慧眼鏡市場走勢完全照我預期穩下來。Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 整週守住 NT$12,000 起跳，Meta Ray-Ban Display 還是 NT$25,500 含 Neural Band 神經手環，Oakley Meta HSTN 降到 NT$11,000，Meta 官網已經掛上父親節橫幅。三週備貨時間給代購運送跟海運都寬裕，智慧眼鏡是少數真的能解決爸爸騎車、烤肉場景的禮物選項。Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 我無條件推第一名，3K 相機把家庭烤肉拍得超漂亮，發 IG 完全不用修，八小時電池讓充電盒留家裡，Meta AI 終於成熟到能翻譯菜單、辨識植物、記停車位置。Meta Ray-Ban Display NT$25,500 是想活在未來的選擇，鏡片內 HUD 在大太陽下讀完整訊息沒問題，Neural Band 讓無聲手勢回訊息變實用。Oakley Meta HSTN NT$11,000 是運動爸爸的父親節禮物，輕量鏡框、可配近視鏡片、Strava 數據直接透過開放式耳機播報，騎車跑步戴超爽，我自己出門已經離不開這副。XREAL One Pro NT$20,500 還是 AR 看片首選，Viture Luma Pro NT$15,500 是飛機高鐵神器，是我會送給常出差爸爸的選擇。週五晚上看上就下單，Meta 庫存六月 10 號之後會緊，父親節需求量會爆。

en.commentary: Smart glasses had a genuinely big spring. Meta expanded Ray-Ban prescription support in late March, Blayzer and Scriber frames starting at $499, available from April 14 at optical retailers, and in May rolled out pedestrian navigation to every U.S. city, delivering turn-by-turn directions right in the lens. EssilorLuxottica tripled Ray-Ban Meta sales to over 7 million pairs in 2025, and that momentum is carrying into 2026. The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 remains my top pick at 9.3: it does more useful things in a lighter package than any XR headset costs ten times as much. The Oakley Meta HSTN at 9.0 is the sport-first alternative with the same Meta AI engine in a performance frame. If you want a display, the Ray-Ban Meta Display at 8.7 now supports teleprompter mode and EMG handwriting, it's still U.S.-focused and international rollout is delayed, but the software stack is maturing fast. For XR viewing, XREAL One Pro scores 8.6 and offers the sharpest micro-OLED experience in its class. The Even Realities G2 at 8.5 rounds out the upper tier with its clean prescription-friendly design. Google AI Glasses are generating buzz as the next comparison target but aren't shipping yet, this remains Meta's category to lose.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta now supports nearly all prescriptions
highlights.body: Starting April 14, the Blayzer and Scriber frames ($499+) bring prescription support to virtually all wearers, massively expanding the addressable market for AI-enabled smart glasses.

highlights.title: Pedestrian navigation expands to all U.S. cities in May
highlights.body: Turn-by-turn directions in the lens are now available across every U.S. city, making Ray-Ban Meta the most practically useful smart glasses for everyday navigation.

highlights.title: 7 million pairs sold proves mass-market viability
highlights.body: EssilorLuxottica's tripled 2025 sales figure confirms smart glasses are crossing from niche to mainstream, the form factor has arrived.

zh-tw.commentary: 今年春天對智慧眼鏡來說真的是大爆發。Meta 在三月底推出 Ray-Ban 處方鏡片版本，Blayzer 和 Scriber 兩款鏡框從 499 美元起，4 月 14 日開始在光學店販售，幾乎支援所有度數，這對習慣戴眼鏡的使用者來說是很重要的進展。五月又把行人導航推廣到美國全部城市，鏡片裡就能看到轉彎提示，真的很實用。EssilorLuxottica 在 2025 年賣出超過 700 萬副 Ray-Ban Meta，業績三倍成長，動能延續到 2026 年。Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 評分 9.3，我的首選不變，日常佩戴輕鬆、Meta AI 功能完整，比大多數 XR 頭顯便宜太多了。Oakley Meta HSTN 評分 9.0 是戶外運動版的最佳替代，同樣的 AI 引擎搭上更運動的外型。有螢幕顯示需求的話，Ray-Ban Meta Display 支援提詞機模式和 EMG 手寫，軟體進步速度很快，雖然現在還是主打美國市場。XREAL One Pro 評分 8.6，是這個價位最清晰的 Micro-OLED XR 體驗。Even Realities G2 評分 8.5，設計簡潔且支援處方鏡片，值得一提。Google AI Glasses 雖然引發討論，但尚未出貨，目前還是 Meta 的天下。

Every Smart Glasses Design Tells You Who They're Chasing

en.commentary: The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 holds my number one, and the steady drumbeat of software wins is why. Meta has now made hands-free nutrition logging real, letting you snap a photo or speak a meal and have Meta AI pull the key details into a food log, and it added WhatsApp group-chat summaries and recall to the Early Access Program. These are the everyday features that make smart glasses stick, and they land on the frames most people will actually buy. The Oakley Meta HSTN stays second as the sportier sibling, and the broader story this week is Meta widening its prescription strategy. The new Blayzer and Scriber frames, launched at $499 to support nearly all prescriptions, matter because the biggest barrier for all-day eyewear has been getting your actual script into a good-looking frame. The Meta Ray-Ban Display holds third, and I am keeping it there deliberately. Teleprompter support and EMG handwriting are genuinely novel, but Meta has delayed international availability indefinitely citing extremely limited inventory and unprecedented demand, so most buyers still cannot get one. For people outside the US, that makes the displayless Gen 2 and Oakley HSTN the realistic flagships. The Xreal One Pro remains my pick for media and big-screen viewing at fourth. My June read: buy the Gen 2 if you want the most polished daily-driver, wait on the Display unless you are in the US and patient, and treat Xreal as a different category aimed at screens rather than AI.

highlights.body: Hands-free nutrition logging via photo or voice now works, and WhatsApp summaries and recall reached Early Access. These are the features that make glasses stick.

highlights.body: The new Blayzer and Scriber frames at $499 support nearly all prescriptions, removing the biggest barrier to wearing smart glasses all day.

highlights.body: At fourth, it remains the pick for media and big-screen viewing, a different category aimed at displays rather than AI assistance.

zh-tw.commentary: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 守住我的第一，靠的就是軟體更新一波接一波。Meta 現在把免動手的飲食記錄做成真的能用，拍張照或講一句就好，Meta AI 會把重點抓進飲食記錄，還把 WhatsApp 群組摘要跟回顧功能丟進搶先體驗計畫。這些就是讓智慧眼鏡讓人離不開的日常功能，而且都落在大多數人真的會買的那副鏡框上。Oakley Meta HSTN 守第二，比較運動風的那一支，這週更大的故事是 Meta 把度數策略做寬。新的 Blayzer 跟 Scriber 鏡框台幣大約一萬五起跳，支援幾乎所有度數，這很關鍵，因為全天戴的眼鏡最大的卡關，一直是怎麼把你真正的度數做進一副好看的框裡。Meta Ray-Ban Display 守第三，我是刻意留在這。提詞機跟 EMG 手寫真的很新鮮，但 Meta 以庫存極度有限、需求空前為由無限期延後國際上市，所以大多數人根本買不到。對美國以外的人來說，沒螢幕的 Gen 2 跟 Oakley HSTN 才是實際買得到的旗艦。Xreal One Pro 守第四，看影片、開大螢幕還是它。六月我的看法，想要最完整的日常機就買 Gen 2，Display 除非你在美國又有耐心不然先等，Xreal 當成另一個品類，它是給螢幕用的，不是拚 AI 的。

highlights.body: 免動手飲食記錄拍照或語音都能用，WhatsApp 摘要跟回顧進了搶先體驗。這些功能讓人離不開。

highlights.body: 新 Blayzer 跟 Scriber 鏡框台幣約一萬五起，支援幾乎所有度數，掃除全天戴的最大卡關。

highlights.body: 提詞機跟 EMG 手寫很新鮮，但 Meta 以庫存有限為由無限期延後國際上市，多數人還是買不到。

Meta Slated to Launch Two New Ray-Ban Smart Glasses, According to FCC Filing

en.commentary:
Smart glasses are the wearable story of 2026, and Meta owns the conversation. The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 holds the top spot at 9.3 overall because it nails the thing that matters most in this category: it is a pair of glasses people actually want to wear all day. The 9.5 design, 9.5 ecosystem, and 9.5 value scores reflect a product where the camera, audio, and AI assistant disappear into a frame that looks like normal Ray-Bans. That, not raw spec sheets, is why this category finally went mainstream.

The Oakley Meta HSTN at rank 2 brings the same Meta platform into a sportier frame, with strong battery life and the wraparound styling that active users prefer. The 9.0 features and 9.5 ecosystem scores carry directly over from the shared Meta foundation.

The Meta Ray-Ban Display at rank 3 is the most ambitious product here, with an in-lens display and the Neural Band for EMG input. Meta is leaning in hard: at CES 2026 it added teleprompter support and virtual EMG handwriting, both rolling out now. The flip side is scarcity. Meta delayed the Display's international launch in the UK, France, Italy, and Canada, citing extremely limited inventory and unprecedented demand. That demand signal is the real headline. With Meta also shipping new prescription-focused Blayzer and Scriber frames at 499 dollars, the platform is widening fast, and a next-gen Ray-Ban Meta is expected around Meta Connect later this year. For buyers right now, the Gen 2 remains the smart, available, everyday choice.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 Wins by Being Wearable All Day
highlights.body: 9.5 design, 9.5 ecosystem, and 9.5 value scores reflect glasses where the camera, audio, and AI disappear into a frame that looks like normal Ray-Bans. That everyday wearability, not a spec sheet, is why this is the category's clear leader.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display Demand Outstrips Supply
highlights.body: Meta delayed the Display's launch in the UK, France, Italy, and Canada, citing extremely limited inventory and unprecedented demand. New CES 2026 teleprompter and EMG handwriting features are rolling out now, underscoring how hard Meta is pushing its in-lens display platform.

highlights.title: Meta's Platform Is Widening Fast
highlights.body: New prescription-focused Blayzer and Scriber frames at 499 dollars bring the Meta platform to all-day eyewear wearers, and a next-gen Ray-Ban Meta is expected around Meta Connect this year. The ecosystem advantage keeps compounding across the lineup.

zh-tw.commentary:
智慧眼鏡是 2026 年穿戴裝置的主角，而話題完全由 Meta 主導。榜單第一的 Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 總分 9.3，靠的是這個品類最關鍵的一件事：它是一副人們真的願意整天戴出門的眼鏡。設計 9.5、生態系 9.5、性價比 9.5 分，相機、音訊、AI 助理全都藏進一副看起來就是普通雷朋的鏡框裡。讓這個品類終於走進主流的，是這個，不是規格表。

Oakley Meta HSTN 第二名，把同一套 Meta 平台放進更運動感的鏡框，電池續航不錯，包覆式造型是運動族的最愛。功能 9.0、生態系 9.5 分，直接繼承了共用的 Meta 基礎。

Meta Ray-Ban Display 第三名，是這裡最有野心的產品，鏡片內建顯示加上 Neural Band 的 EMG 輸入。Meta 押得很重：CES 2026 加入了提詞機支援和虛擬 EMG 手寫，現在都在陸續推送。另一面則是缺貨。Meta 延後了 Display 在英國、法國、義大利和加拿大的上市，理由是庫存極度有限、需求空前。這個需求訊號才是真正的重點。Meta 同時推出主打處方鏡片的 Blayzer 和 Scriber 鏡框，售價 499 美元，平台正在快速擴張，下一代 Ray-Ban Meta 預計今年 Meta Connect 前後登場。對現在就想入手的人，Gen 2 仍然是聰明、買得到、最適合日常的選擇。

highlights.body: 設計 9.5、生態系 9.5、性價比 9.5 分，相機、音訊、AI 全藏進看起來就是普通雷朋的鏡框。讓它成為品類明確龍頭的，是這種日常可戴性，不是規格表。

highlights.body: Meta 延後了 Display 在英、法、義、加的上市，理由是庫存極度有限、需求空前。CES 2026 的提詞機和 EMG 手寫功能正在推送，凸顯 Meta 對鏡片內顯示平台押得有多重。

references.title: Ray-Ban Meta Smart Glasses Review: Better, Cooler, and More Useful Than Ever
Google AI Glasses vs Meta Ray-Ban: Smart Eyewear's First Real Fight
Meta Ray-Ban Display Smart Glasses Review 2026

en.commentary: The second generation Ray-Ban Meta stays my number one, and this week's reviews land exactly where I do, Meta now carries the flag for smart glasses in everyday usefulness. The upgrade to Qualcomm's AR1 Gen 1 platform is the quiet hero here, it is a big jump over the wearable chip in the first pair, and it shows in faster captures, snappier voice commands, and on device AI that works without reaching for your phone. Add IPX4 water resistance and the same Ray-Ban looks people already love and you get the camera first social wearable that wins for most buyers. The Oakley Meta HSTN holds second on the strength of its sportier wraparound design and longer battery, it is the pick if your day involves running, cycling, or just a face that suits the Oakley shape. The Meta Ray-Ban Display sits third and earns its premium for the right person, the built in heads up display, 12MP camera, and Neural Band controller justify the 799 dollar price if you actually want hands free navigation, live translation, and glanceable notifications. On the display glasses side, the Xreal One Pro remains the best for turning a pair of glasses into a giant private screen, its optics and field of view lead the category for media and gaming. Even Realities G2 keeps climbing for its discreet everyday display. Google's AI glasses are circling but Meta still owns the practical crown today. Nothing this week moves the order.

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 owns everyday usefulness
highlights.body: The jump to Qualcomm's AR1 Gen 1 platform delivers faster captures, snappier voice commands, and on device AI that works without your phone. Add IPX4 water resistance and the iconic Ray-Ban looks and it is the camera first social wearable that wins for most people.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display justifies its premium for the right user
highlights.body: The built in heads up display, 12MP camera, and Neural Band controller make the $799 price worth it if you genuinely want hands free navigation, live translation, and glanceable notifications. It is the pick for someone who wants information in their line of sight, not just a camera.

highlights.title: Xreal One Pro is the big screen champion
highlights.body: Its optics and field of view lead the category for turning a pair of glasses into a giant private display, ideal for movies and gaming on the go. For media first buyers who want a personal cinema rather than a social camera, it is the clear choice.

zh-tw.commentary: 第二代 Ray-Ban Meta 還是我的第一名，這週的評測跟我想的一樣，論日常實用度，Meta 現在就是智慧眼鏡的扛霸子。升級到 Qualcomm AR1 Gen 1 平台是低調的功臣，比第一代那顆穿戴晶片進步一大截，反映在更快的拍攝、更俐落的語音指令，還有不用掏手機就能跑的裝置端 AI。再加上 IPX4 防潑水跟大家本來就愛的 Ray-Ban 外型，這就是大多數人會買單的相機優先社交眼鏡。Oakley Meta HSTN 守第二，靠的是更運動感的環繞式設計跟更長的續航，跑步、騎車或臉型適合 Oakley 的人選它就對了。Meta Ray-Ban Display 排第三，對對的人來說值這個錢，內建抬頭顯示、1200 萬畫素相機、Neural Band 控制環，如果你真的想要免持導航、即時翻譯、瞄一眼就看到的通知，台幣兩萬四這價就划算。顯示型眼鏡這邊，Xreal One Pro 還是把眼鏡變成巨大私人螢幕的最強選擇，光學跟視野在這類別領先，看片打電動超讚。Even Realities G2 靠低調的日常顯示聲量一直漲。Google 的 AI 眼鏡在旁邊虎視眈眈，但今天實用王冠還是 Meta 的。這週排名不動。

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta 二代日常實用最強
highlights.body: 升級 Qualcomm AR1 Gen 1 平台，拍攝更快、語音指令更俐落、裝置端 AI 不用掏手機就能跑。再加上 IPX4 防潑水跟經典 Ray-Ban 外型，這就是大多數人會買單的相機優先社交眼鏡。

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display 對的人就值這個錢
highlights.body: 內建抬頭顯示、1200 萬畫素相機、Neural Band 控制環，如果你真的想要免持導航、即時翻譯、瞄一眼就看到通知，台幣兩萬四就划算。想把資訊放進視線裡、不只是拍照的人，選它。

highlights.title: Xreal One Pro 是大螢幕冠軍
highlights.body: 光學跟視野在這類別領先，把眼鏡變成巨大私人螢幕，出門看片打電動超適合。想要個人劇院、不是社交相機的影音優先買家，它就是明確選擇。

references.title: Best Smart Glasses 2026: Top AI and AR picks for Every Budget
Meta Ray-Ban Display and Neural Band

en.commentary: In early June 2026 my smart-glasses ranking holds, and the second-gen Ray-Ban Meta keeps the lead because it is the only AI-glass family that consistently passes as ordinary eyewear. The on-frame camera shoots up to 3K Ultra HD video, the Meta AI button answers questions about whatever you are looking at, and the fit and weight are good enough that people forget they are wearing a computer. The Oakley Meta HSTN holds second as the sportier, sweat-friendly take on the same platform. The Meta Ray-Ban Display sits third and remains the most interesting pure-display play, its in-lens screen paired with the EMG Neural Band gives you a viewfinder, a 12MP camera with 3X zoom, and two-way video calls right on your face. The recurring story this week is that the field is finally getting a real fight, Google, Samsung, Warby Parker, and Gentle Monster jointly previewed the first Android XR reference glasses, and Meta with EssilorLuxottica rolled out new prescription-first frames across LensCrafters, so the prescription path is wider than ever. On the AR display side the Xreal One Pro stays my travel pick for head-tracked virtual screens, with the Viture leaning into raw image quality. None of this week's announcements ship a product that beats the current leaders, so I am carrying the order forward. Buy Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 for everyday capture and AI, step up to the Display model if you want an in-lens screen, and grab the Xreal One Pro for big private screens on the move.

references.title: Ray-Ban Meta AI glasses Gen 2 & Gen 1
Every Smart Glasses Design Tells You Who They're Chasing

en.commentary: My smart glasses board in June keeps the Ray-Ban Meta (Gen 2) at number one because it is still the pair that gets the everyday formula right. The Llama 4 integration makes Meta AI genuinely useful for hands-free questions, calls and texts, and the Gen 2 added 42 percent more battery capacity for up to five hours of music or voice calls. It looks like normal Ray-Bans, costs far less than the display models, and that combination of style, price and a camera that just works keeps it the default I recommend. The Oakley Meta HSTN holds second as the sportier sibling, the same proven Meta platform in a frame built for active wear, which is the pick for runners and cyclists. The Meta Ray-Ban Display stays third and is the only serious display-equipped option you can buy today, with its in-lens screen and Neural Band wristband control, but at 799 dollars with weaker battery it is still the early-adopter choice rather than the everyday one. The XREAL One Pro holds fourth as the best media-viewing AR glasses, and the Oakley Meta Vanguard and XREAL One round out a strong upper tier. Even Realities G1, the Solos and RayNeo entries carry forward. Nothing this week reshuffled the order, so I held ranks. Buy the Ray-Ban Meta for everyday, the Display for AR, XREAL for big-screen viewing.

highlights.body: Llama 4 makes Meta AI genuinely useful, the Gen 2 added 42 percent more battery for up to five hours of use, and it looks like normal Ray-Bans. That style, price and camera combo keeps it number one.

highlights.body: Its in-lens screen and Neural Band wristband control make it the only serious display-equipped option you can buy today. At 799 dollars with weaker battery it is the early-adopter choice, holding third.

highlights.body: Its display glasses deliver the best private big-screen media experience on the board, ideal for travel and gaming. For viewing rather than AI assistance, it stays the specialist pick at fourth.

zh-tw.commentary: 6 月我的智慧眼鏡榜還是 Ray-Ban Meta（Gen 2）排第一，因為它依然是把日常公式做對的那副。Llama 4 整合讓 Meta AI 在免手操作問問題、打電話、傳訊息上真的好用，Gen 2 又加了 42% 電池容量，音樂或語音通話最多撐五小時。它長得就像普通 Ray-Ban，價格遠低於有顯示器的型號，這種風格、價格加上一個真的能用的相機的組合，讓它穩坐我推薦的預設選擇。Oakley Meta HSTN 守第二，是運動版兄弟，同樣成熟的 Meta 平台裝進為運動打造的鏡框，是跑者跟單車族的選擇。Meta Ray-Ban Display 守第三，是你今天買得到唯一認真的顯示器款，鏡片內螢幕加 Neural Band 腕帶操控，但售價約台幣兩萬四、電池又較弱，還是早期採用者的選擇而非日常款。XREAL One Pro 守第四，是最好的影音觀看 AR 眼鏡，Oakley Meta Vanguard 跟 XREAL One 撐起強勢上段。Even Realities G1、Solos 跟 RayNeo 全部照舊。這週沒事件洗牌，所以我守住排名。日常買 Ray-Ban Meta，要 AR 買 Display，要大螢幕觀看買 XREAL。

highlights.title: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 把日常公式做對
highlights.body: Llama 4 讓 Meta AI 真的好用，Gen 2 加了 42% 電池最多撐五小時，外觀就像普通 Ray-Ban。這種風格、價格加相機的組合讓它穩坐第一。

highlights.body: 鏡片內螢幕加 Neural Band 腕帶操控，是你今天買得到唯一認真的顯示器款。售價約台幣兩萬四、電池較弱，是早期採用者選擇，守第三。

references.title: Best smart glasses 2026: Ray-Ban Meta and the field tested
Best AR and smart glasses 2026

en.commentary: The Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 stays at number one because it is the only smart glasses I can recommend to a normal person without an asterisk. They look like Ray-Bans, the camera and audio are genuinely good, the Meta AI assistant is useful for quick lookups, and the battery finally lasts a real day. For the vast majority of buyers this is the pair to get. The Oakley Meta HSTN holds second as the same formula in a sportier frame, the pick for people who want the active styling, and the wraparound fit is better for running and cycling. The Meta Ray-Ban Display stays third and is the genuinely exciting one, the in-lens display and neural wristband point at where the category is going, but the price and first-gen rough edges keep it a step behind the no-display pairs for now. Xreal One Pro holds fourth as the best pick for a different job entirely, a wearable big-screen display for media and work rather than an everyday assistant. The map is clear: Ray-Ban Meta for everyday, Oakley for sport, Display for early adopters, Xreal for screens.

highlights.body: They look like Ray-Bans, the camera and audio are genuinely good, the AI is useful for lookups and battery lasts a real day. For most buyers this is the pair to get, holding a clear number one.

highlights.body: Same proven formula in a sportier wraparound frame that fits better for running and cycling. For active buyers who want the styling and fit, it is the natural pick and a firm second.

highlights.title: Meta Ray-Ban Display points at the future
highlights.body: The in-lens display and neural wristband show where the category is heading, but first-gen rough edges and price keep it behind the simpler pairs for now. It holds an exciting third for early adopters.

highlights.title: Xreal One Pro does a different job
highlights.body: It is a wearable big-screen display for media and work rather than an everyday AI assistant. For that specific use case it leads the field, holding fourth as the pick for portable screens.

zh-tw.commentary: Ray-Ban Meta Gen 2 我還是放第一，因為它是我能毫無但書推薦給一般人的唯一智慧眼鏡。它看起來就是 Ray-Ban，相機跟音訊都真的不錯，Meta AI 助手做快速查詢很實用，電池終於撐得過真正的一整天。對絕大多數買家，就是這副。Oakley Meta HSTN 守第二，是同一套公式換上運動感框型，給想要動感造型的人，包覆式設計跑步騎車更合適。Meta Ray-Ban Display 守第三，是真正讓人興奮的那副，鏡片內顯示加神經腕帶指向類別的未來，但價格跟第一代的粗糙讓它暫時落後無顯示款一步。Xreal One Pro 守第四，做的是完全不同的活，是穿戴式大螢幕顯示器、用來看影音跟工作，而非日常助手。地圖很清楚：日常選 Ray-Ban Meta、運動選 Oakley、嘗鮮選 Display、要螢幕選 Xreal。
